titleStmt.title: SII 38.205: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 205. (A.R. No. 205 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, of Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Ariyaṇa uḍaiyār Year: Raudri, Kanni, śu. di. 12 Tuesday, Aviṭṭam.

summary.p: Incomplete. Records a gift of 1/2 karai, out of 12 karai of land in the village Pāḍiāḍumperumāḷnallūr, to the deity at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, a taniyūr in Puḻar-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for conducting certain festivals and also for maintaining the Aṅgarāyār-maḍam by Aṅgarāya Mudaliyār and others of Puḻal alias Rājasundarinallūr. It is stated that out of 12 karai into which the land of the ūr, Puḻal had been constituted, 10(1/2) karai of land was already tirunāmattukkāṇi and another one karai had been acquired earlier by the temple as tirunāmattukkāṇi from Tiruchchiṟṟambalam uḍaiyār. Now the balance 1/2 karai was also acquired by the above persons and endowed to the temple for the purposes stated above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyarkkuc cellāniṉṟa ravutri varuṣam kaṉṉināyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu tuvāteciyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkirama coḻavaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr tiruvoṟṟiyūr
Uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉārkku puḻalāṉa Irācacuntarinallūr niyamaṅkiḻāṉ matiyār miṟai pukaḻ neṟi Avaiyam pukkār Aṅkarāyar mutaliyār Uḷḷiṭṭārom Utakam paṇṇik kalluveṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭi pāṭu Āṭumperumāḷnallūril
Ūroṉṟāṉa karai paṉṉiraṇṭil muṉṉāḷ tirunāmattukkāṇi pattaraik karaiyum nikki tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār pakkal tāṅkaḷ koṇṭa karai Oṉṟum Uṭpaṭa Āka karai patiṉ Oṉṟaraiyum nīkki Eṅkaḷ Araiyum
Uṭaiyavar tantaruḷi Aṅkarāyaṉmaṭattukkum Oḷipavaṉikkut tirukkaṇcātti Aruḷa UṇpayattukkumRead upaiyattukkumUṭaiyavarkku Utakapūṟuvamāka tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa Ippaṭikku Aṟamarttanāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai pāṭiāṭuvāṉ
k kuṭuttomLines 5 and 6 are not in continuation with each other.Ūr Oṉṟāṉa karai paṉṉiraṇṭum cantirātittavarai tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka naṭakkakaṭavatākavum Inta tirunāmattukkā
Digital edition of SII 38.205 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
